title: Passports and citizenship data: Q4 2024
body: "This document contains data on:   passport application intake volumes by month domestic and overseas applications for new, renewed, replacement or updated or extended UK passports volumes of British passports issued following applications lodged in the UK by quarter volumes of initial contact following British passport applications lodged in the UK by quarter passport applications in the system by quarter number of British Citizenship applications received and input, or applications that are submitted online percentage of British Citizenship applications processed within service standards British Citizenship applications Work-In-Progress HMPO - applicant experience survey results citizenship - applicant experience survey results   "
